name: n8n-nodes-clientify
description: N8N node for Clientify CRM integration

scripts.build: node scripts/generateOperationCatalog.cjs && n8n-node build && cp TRIGGERS_REFERENCE.md dist/ && mkdir -p dist/nodes/ClientifyApi dist/nodes/ClientifyTrigger && cp nodes/ClientifyMcp/*.png dist/nodes/ClientifyApi/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp nodes/ClientifyMcp/*.svg dist/nodes/ClientifyApi/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp nodes/ClientifyMcp/*.png dist/nodes/ClientifyTrigger/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp nodes/ClientifyMcp/*.svg dist/nodes/ClientifyTrigger/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run lint
